allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $e = $_.Exception.Response; if \($e\) { "Status: $\($e.StatusCode.value__\) — Location: $\($e.Headers['Location']\)" } else { $_.Exception.Message } })
